# jellyfin_plugins (Data Source)

Lists all installed Jellyfin plugins.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_plugins" "all" {}

output "plugin_names" {
  value = [for p in data.jellyfin_plugins.all.plugins : p.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `plugins` (Attributes List) The list of installed plugins. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--plugins))

<a id="nestedatt--plugins"></a>
### Nested Schema for `plugins`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The plugin ID.
- `name` (String) The plugin name.
- `status` (String) The plugin status.
- `version` (String) The installed plugin version.
